title: KS Recipes
description: new recipes QoL fixes for vanilla blocks and items
body:
New recipes for vanilla blocks and items:

All the planks can be used in the stonecutter to make doors, buttons, fence, fence gate, sign, hanging sign, pressure plate, slabs, stairs, trapdoors, and other wood specific variants.

All the recipes that uses stone can be crafted with blackstone or deepslate, and polished blackstone or polished deepslate for smooth stone recipes.

All horses armors can be crafted with the same recipe pattern as the leather horse armor.

All the recipes that uses books can be crafted with enchanted books and books&quill.

The enchanted golden apple can be crafted with a golden apple and 8 gold blocks.
